description: ITS_Config data dictionary — generated by scripts/generate_config_dictionary.py from the in-repo daemon REQUIRED_CONFIG declarations. Network-free, deterministic.

keys.purpose: Per-stream gate: mirror equipment status from the portal into Smartsheet.
Per-stream gate: mirror crew hours from the portal into Smartsheet.
Per-stream gate: mirror material incidents from the portal into Smartsheet.
Per-stream gate: mirror material receipts from the portal into Smartsheet. (Activation is gated on the §51 rider — read the row's Description before flipping.)
Master gate for the portal→Smartsheet job mirror (fieldops_sync). Ships OFF; the operator flips it on at cutover after the mirror slices land.
How long (minutes) a repeated CRITICAL alert is suppressed on the push legs (email + Sentry) before it can fire again. The per-occurrence ITS_Errors record is never suppressed.
Global ceiling on operator alert emails per hour across all keys, so a flapping failure cannot fire unbounded email. The record is never capped — only the email fan-out.
How long (seconds) the breaker stays open before a trial half-open call.
Whether the Smartsheet circuit breaker is armed. When tripped it short-circuits Smartsheet calls during an outage to fail fast.
Consecutive Smartsheet failures before the breaker opens (trips).
How long (seconds) the breaker may stay open before the watchdog fires a prolonged-open CRITICAL page.
Option count that HARD-HALTS that one mapping's sync (a runaway guardrail).
Option count on a synced picklist that triggers a WARN (a large but still-processed list).
Per-workspace sheet-count ceiling; a new week/period sheet that would land past it routes to the Review Queue instead of being created silently.
Headroom below the ceiling at which the sheet-capacity guard starts warning.
The external UptimeRobot heartbeat URL the watchdog pings each run so a total MacBook-death (the watchdog can't alert about itself) is caught.
Where out-of-band operator alerts (Resend) are sent when ITS_Config cannot be read — the last-resort page recipient during a Smartsheet outage.

The system kill switch. ACTIVE = normal; PAUSED / MAINTENANCE make every daemon exit cleanly at entry. Fail-open: an unreadable value is treated as ACTIVE. This is an operator-convenience pause, not a security control.
Runtime gate for the §50 config actuator daemon (applies approved workstream-config changes on the Mac).
Max pages rendered as disposition-screen previews per estimate (Quartz via the estimate_sandbox child).
Runtime on/off gate for the po_materials.estimate_poll daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Optional ClamAV layer of the §34 doc screener (po_attach_screen L3), SHARED with po_poll's attachment pass. Default OFF.
Runtime gate for the PO pull daemon (pulls submitted POs from the Worker). Ships dark.
Sub-gate: sync PO statuses back to the portal. Ships dark.
Sub-gate: push the vendor list down to the portal PO dropdown. Ships dark.
The M365 mailbox the po_materials.po_send send daemon sends approved email FROM.
Runtime on/off gate for the po_materials.po_send daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Local-time window (e.g. `MON 07:00`) at/after which a row approved with **Approve for Scheduled Send** may dispatch on the po_materials.po_send path.
Base URL of the Safety Portal Cloudflare Worker. The portal pull / PO / progress daemons hit its send-free internal API here. Repointed to the custom domain (safety.evergreenmirror.com) after deploy.
Box root folder ID under which progress-report packets are filed.
Runtime on/off gate for the progress_reports.compile_now_poll daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Row-count on the mirror sheet at which progress_reports.equipment_status WARNs that the sheet is approaching the Smartsheet per-sheet row cap.
The name ITS uses for the Evergreen Renewables office/contact in this workstream's report copy.
Row-count on the mirror sheet at which progress_reports.hours_log WARNs that the sheet is approaching the Smartsheet per-sheet row cap.
Row-count on the mirror sheet at which progress_reports.material_incidents WARNs that the sheet is approaching the Smartsheet per-sheet row cap.
Row-count on the mirror sheet at which progress_reports.material_list WARNs that the sheet is approaching the Smartsheet per-sheet row cap.
The M365 mailbox the progress_reports.progress_send send daemon sends approved email FROM.
Runtime on/off gate for the progress_reports.progress_send daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Local-time window (e.g. `MON 07:00`) at/after which a row approved with **Approve for Scheduled Send** may dispatch on the progress_reports.progress_send path.
Per-job wall-clock ceiling (seconds) for the progress_reports.progress_weekly_generate weekly compile; a job exceeding it is fenced to the Review Queue, not left to hang.
Memory ceiling (bytes) for the progress_reports.progress_weekly_generate PDF-merge step; a packet whose merge would exceed it is refused rather than risk OOMing the daemon.
Shared Worker base URL, read under progress_reports for the P6 rollup page.
FOOTGUN: the progress-intake gate is read under Workstream='safety_reports' (intake's own workstream), NOT 'progress_reports' — seed it there.
Shared Box mirror-tree root; owned by safety_reports. Clean estimates file under ROOT→<job>→'Purchase Orders'→'Vendor Quotes'.
Runtime on/off gate for the safety_reports.compile_now_poll daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
The name ITS uses for the Evergreen Renewables office/contact in this workstream's report copy.
Comma-separated sender allowlist for the intake extraction path (the retired email-PDF intake; the live path is the portal PULL). Empty = none set.
Whether intake files the rendered safety PDF to Box. Off keeps the pipeline running but skips the Box upload.
The Anthropic model the intake extraction/classification step uses. Legacy email-intake path; dormant.
Extraction-confidence floor (0–1). Below it, an item routes to the Review Queue instead of being trusted (Op Stds confidence scoring).
The mailbox the (now-dormant, legacy) safety email-intake path read from. The live path is the portal PULL model; this remains for the retired email caller.
Whether a below-threshold extraction is routed to the Review Queue (true) rather than dropped.
Turns on the ClamAV leg of the §34 photo screen (magic + Pillow verify + re-encode always run; this adds the AV scan). Default OFF.
Shared Worker base URL; owned by safety_reports, read here too.
Runtime on/off gate for the safety_reports.portal_poll daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Runtime on/off gate for the safety_reports.publish_daemon daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Per-job wall-clock ceiling (seconds) for the safety_reports.weekly_generate weekly compile; a job exceeding it is fenced to the Review Queue, not left to hang.
Memory ceiling (bytes) for the safety_reports.weekly_generate PDF-merge step; a packet whose merge would exceed it is refused rather than risk OOMing the daemon.
The M365 mailbox the safety_reports.weekly_send send daemon sends approved email FROM.
Runtime on/off gate for the safety_reports.weekly_send daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Local-time window (e.g. `MON 07:00`) at/after which a row approved with **Approve for Scheduled Send** may dispatch on the safety_reports.weekly_send path.
Runtime on/off gate for the subcontracts.subcontract_poll daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Sub-gate for subcontracts.subcontract_poll: sync statuses back to the portal.

Gate for subcontract_poll's §51 subcontractor-sync passes: the ITS_Subcontractors full-replace down-sync into the Worker's D1 cache AND the dirty-subcontractor up-sync back into ITS_Subcontractors (bridge-key find-or-create by Sub Key). Ships dark.
The M365 mailbox the subcontracts.subcontract_send send daemon sends approved email FROM.
Runtime on/off gate for the subcontracts.subcontract_send daemon. False pauses it without unloading its launchd job (the canonical runtime gate, distinct from the report-filter Enabled checkbox).
Local-time window (e.g. `MON 07:00`) at/after which a row approved with **Approve for Scheduled Send** may dispatch on the subcontracts.subcontract_send path.
